subject: fix(ui): move zoom controls above canvas display
body:
Zoom buttons were floating over the canvas bottom-right, obscuring
content on mobile. Moved them above the canvas as inline controls,
right-aligned with a bottom margin. Simpler to tap and no longer
overlaps the design preview.

Tags: ui, mobile, zoom, canvas
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
